# Phase G – Implementation plan: DXF → job → RTC Remote Interface

This document plans the **next engineering step** after the Phase G **scope + demo file** landed in the MVP catalog ([`mvp-feature-katalog.md`](mvp-feature-katalog.md): **B-07…B-09**, **F-05…F-07**, **X-03**). It is the working breakdown for implementers; revise as spikes complete.

**Demo file:** [`demo/dxf/SCANLABLogo.dxf`](../../demo/dxf/SCANLABLogo.dxf) — ASCII DXF **AC1015**, generated by **netDxf**; **ENTITIES** section is dominated by **`LINE`** segments (verified in-repo). Treat **LINE-only** as the first parser milestone; add **LWPOLYLINE**, **ARC**, **CIRCLE** when a second reference file requires them.

---

## 1. Goals and non-goals

**Goals**

- Load DXF (upload + bundled demo path), parse to a **stable internal job model** (ordered segments / polylines + metadata).
- **Display** geometry in the browser (2D canvas or SVG) and show an **entity / job item** list tied to the same model.
- **Mock RTC** accepts the job; **start** returns to **loaded** immediately (simulated end-of-list). **Ethernet** uses **loaded → running** until stop or board idle; same logical load/start/stop API.
- **Tests:** unit tests on parser + mapper; Playwright slice for “load demo → list visible → run”.

**Non-goals (remain out of scope)**

- Full DXF / DWG coverage, blocks/inserts, dimensions, hatches, 3D meshes.
- laserDESK `.sld` import, full geometry **editor** (catalog §3).
- Optimised scan ordering, skywriting, variable delays (defer to later workflows).

---

## 2. Prerequisites

| Prerequisite | Why |
|--------------|-----|
| RTC6 **software package** on a dev machine | Authoritative **list buffer** / **Remote List Command** opcodes (`telegrams.h`, examples) for **B-08** |
| Existing **`IRtcClient`**, `MockRtcClient`, `EthernetRtcClient` | Extend or add `load_dxf_job(...)` / job descriptor type rather than a parallel stack |
| OpenAPI / REST consistency | Extend [`docs/api/openapi-phase-a-sketch.yaml`](../api/openapi-phase-a-sketch.yaml) when routes are fixed |

---

## 3. Internal job model (suggested)

Keep backend-centric, JSON-serialisable for API and tests:

- **`DxfJob`** — `id`, `source_name`, `units_hint`, `entities[]`.
- **`Entity`** — `type` (`line` \| `polyline` \| …), `layer`, `handle` (optional), geometry (`start`/`end` for lines), `index` for UI list.
- **`RtcJobPlan`** (optional intermediate) — ordered **laser operations** (jump/mark vectors) produced by a **mapper** from `DxfJob`; mock consumes `RtcJobPlan` or a simplified “segment count + bounds” for state machine.

Start minimal: **N lines** → **N mark segments** in user units; document scale factor (e.g. mm vs arbitrary DXF units) as a **TODO** with default 1:1 for demo.

---

## 4. Milestones (recommended order)

### G.1 – Parser spike (backend, C++ or library)

- **Input:** file path or raw bytes; **output:** `DxfJob` JSON or in-memory struct.
- **Scope:** **LINE** entities only, **ENTITIES** section, ignore BLOCKS for v1 if logo needs only ENTITIES.
- **Tests:** `laserdesk_tests` with fixture [`demo/dxf/SCANLABLogo.dxf`](../../demo/dxf/SCANLABLogo.dxf) — assert entity count ≥ 1, first line coordinates match known sample.
- **Decision point:** hand-rolled minimal scanner vs small dependency (e.g. **nanodxf**, single-header style) vs subprocess — prefer **C++17**, no Windows-only APIs in core (per `AGENTS.md`).

### G.2 – REST API

- e.g. `POST /api/v1/jobs/dxf` — `multipart/form-data` **or** body `{ "use_demo": true }` / `{ "path": "…" }` (demo only in dev).
- e.g. `GET /api/v1/jobs/dxf/{job_id}` — returns `DxfJob` summary + entity list for UI.
- Errors: `DXF_PARSE_ERROR`, `UNSUPPORTED_ENTITY`, stable codes (align with **B-05**).

### G.3 – Mock RTC integration (**B-09** first slice)

- Extend **`IRtcClient`** (or session layer): **load** parsed job → state **loaded**; **start** iterates segments (or simulates duration); **stop** unchanged.
- Unit tests: parse demo → load → start → mock status returns to **loaded** immediately (simulated end-of-list); **Stop** is only for Ethernet / future timed mock runs.

### G.4 – RTC mapper (**B-08**) — **implemented (repo)**

- **`RtcJobPlan`** + parse from DXF job JSON: `backend/src/rtc/job/rtc_job_plan.*`
- **List command sequence:** `backend/src/rtc/job/dxf_rif_list_mapper.*` — per LINE: **`R_LC_JUMP_XY_ABS`** + **`R_LC_MARK_XYZT_ABS`** (then **`R_LC_END_OF_LIST`**); numeric IDs mirrored in `backend/src/rtc/rif/remote_list_commands.hpp` (keep in sync with SCANLAB package **`telegrams.h`**). Same pattern as RIF **`jump_xy_abs` / `mark_xyzt_abs` / `set_end_of_list`** in the vendor wrapper.
- **`EthernetRtcClient::load_dxf_job`:** when **`dxf_rif_list_upload: true`**, sends **`R_DC_CONFIG_LIST`**, **`R_DC_GET_INPUT_POINTER`**, then one UDP telegram per list command (default **false** on connect). **Scaling:** list coordinates use **`dxf_rif_bits_per_mm`** from connect unless a prior successful **`POST /api/v1/rtc/correction/load`** on Ethernet updated it from **`R_DC_GET_HEAD_PARA`** (ct5 header parameter **1**, K xy [bit/mm]).
- **Unit tests:** `backend/tests/test_dxf_rif_list_mapper.cpp`
- **Integration:** optional hardware test still via `LASERDESK_RTC6_HOST` (no automated assertion on list content yet).

### G.5 – Frontend (**F-05…F-07**)

- **Load:** file input + “Load SCANLAB demo” button (`/demo/dxf/SCANLABLogo.dxf` with `$app/paths` **base**).
- **Display:** canvas/SVG; fit-to-view; optional highlight on list selection. *(Related UX: the **vector scene editor** on `/editor` implements **pan/zoom** + aligned mm SVG overlay in `frontend/src/lib/components/SceneEditor.svelte`; **laser presets / per-entity override** metadata in submitted `scene_v1` — see MVP catalog **F-13** and `frontend/src/lib/scene/sceneV1.ts`; **Shift+click** multi-select per **F-11** / `frontend/src/lib/scene/selection.ts`. The **DXF** route may adopt the same interaction model in a follow-up if product wants consistent navigation.)*
- **Entity list:** table: index, type, layer, length or endpoints.
- **Workflow:** extend [`workflow-schema.json`](../workflows/workflow-schema.json) + new workflow JSON **or** add steps to reference workflow — only if workflow engine should own the flow; otherwise a dedicated **`/dxf`** route is acceptable for the first slice.
- **Run:** call `POST …/run` (or unified job run API) after successful parse/load.

### G.6 – E2E (**X-03**)

- Playwright: open app → load demo DXF → assert list row count → start run → assert status / mock behaviour.
- Run in existing [`.github/workflows/e2e.yml`](../../.github/workflows/e2e.yml).

---

## 5. API sketch (indicative)

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| `POST` | `/api/v1/jobs/dxf` | Upload or request demo parse; returns `{ job_id }` |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/jobs/dxf/{job_id}` | Job + entities for UI |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/jobs/dxf/{job_id}/run` | Start (after load into RTC session) |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/jobs/dxf/{job_id}/stop` | Stop |

Consolidate with existing **`/jobs/minimal-demo`** if product prefers a single **job** resource with `kind: "dxf" | "minimal-demo"` — document choice in OpenAPI when implementing.

---

## 6. Risks

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| RTC list semantics differ by firmware/package | Spike against **official** examples; version-gate in API |
| DXF units vs scanner field | Expose **scale** / **origin** in API and UI defaults |
| Large files | Max upload size, streaming parse later |
| GitHub Pages + multipart | Hosted UI may only use **demo URL** or base64 unless backend proxies uploads |

---

## 7. Definition of done (Phase G implementation)

- Catalog rows **B-07…B-09**, **F-05…F-07**, **X-03** are satisfied or explicitly split into follow-up tickets with catalog update.
- **`demo/dxf/SCANLABLogo.dxf`** used in at least one **automated** test.
- `docs/implementation-plan.md` Phase G **status** updated from “catalog only” to **complete** or **partial** with link to this file.

---

*Version: 1.3 · March 2026 — G.5 cross-reference: scene editor pan/zoom + `scene_v1` laser metadata (F-13) + multi-select (F-11)*
